channel.title: Japanese on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Japanese on yexca'Blog

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "こんなに素晴らしい世界で"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Introduction

I first ran into this song while waiting for interview results. I was in a total slump and feeling pretty anxious. I guess feeling dread during a selection process is normal, but when this track popped up on random shuffle, I went from happy to terrified in a second.

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "pris-magic!"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Intro

I grabbed Shigure Ui’s first physical album, “Mada Ame wa Yamanai,” a while back, but honestly, I mostly just had “rainy lady” on repeat. Then, last week, I stumbled upon the limited first-edition of her second album, “fiction,” and snagged it. While checking it out, I went back to “Mada Ame wa Yamanai” and realized I’d totally overlooked this gem of a track!

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "恋しくなったら手を叩こう"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Intro

The sound and the song’s vibe? A perfect match, seriously. Especially after the “Se-no!” kicks in, it just bursts with this airy, youthful feel. Super fresh, super sweet style.

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "rainy lady"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview

Considering this series doesn’t seem to offer much actual help for “Japanese Learning” and is publicly searchable, I’ve renamed the series to better reflect its current state.
Basically, these are mostly my personal reflections on music. The lyric translations follow my own interpretation (how I felt when I heard them) and might not perfectly align with the original text.

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "生きるを選んだ私へ"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Introduction

Just by the title, I roughly grasped the song’s meaning, and it also triggered my past thoughts on life. Before, I could never find an answer to “why live?”. But, flipping it, “why not end it?”. I explored ways to commit suicide and their consequences. I realized I feared suicide. So, because of that fear, I chose to live. This perfectly aligns with the song.

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "drop"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Intro

Today, I tried the December 2019 N1 test. Accidentally passed! That instantly sparked my desire to write articles about learning Japanese – thus, this series was born.

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "17さいのうた"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Introduction

At first, I could only understand the part about the letter to the self. It felt like it matched where I was when I first heard it, so I kept it on repeat.

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "あくあ色ぱれっと"
item.description:
📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Intro

My initial pick for the second song was my 2024 Song of the Year. But then an Aqua song came on, and this one clicked. I’d been listening to it because a middle section kind of mirrored my own life. After a deep dive into the translation, it hit me: this is the origin of the “dyed in Aqua’s colors” meme! (I heard “want to be dyed in Aqua’s colors” at C105 and actually thought it was from ‘Kimi-iro ni Somaru’).

item.title: Echoes of Emotion - "僕が死のうと思ったのは"
item.description:
📢 This article was partially machine translated
Thoughts on Music Series
Song Title Translation Link
僕が死のうと思ったのは I Once Thought I’d Rather Die /en/archives/214
あくあ色ぱれっと Aqua-Colored Palette /en/archives/219
恋の押し売り Love Push-Selling /en/archives/220
17さいのうた Song of a 17-Year-Old /en/archives/224
drop Drop https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/230
生きるを選んだ私へ To the Me Who Chose to Live /en/archives/239
rainy lady Rain Still Lingers /en/archives/249
恋しくなったら手を叩こう If You Want to Fall in Love, Clap Your Hands /en/archives/250
pris-magic! Prism Magic! /en/archives/260
こんなに素晴らしい世界で In Such a Wonderful World /en/archives/270

Introduction

Is there a a way to study language listening without feeling like you’re studying, sometimes you can listen to repeatedly and try shadowing? Isn’t that music!
